<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="home">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="home"> Home </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="settings"> Settings </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="home">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="home"> Home </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="settings" :disabled="true"> Disabled </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import TabsBasic from "@/examples/tabs/TabsBasic.vue"
import TabsDisabled from "@/examples/tabs/TabsDisabled.vue"
import TabsIconOnly from "@/examples/tabs/TabsIconOnly.vue"
import TabsLine from "@/examples/tabs/TabsLine.vue"
import TabsLineDisabled from "@/examples/tabs/TabsLineDisabled.vue"
import TabsLineWithContent from "@/examples/tabs/TabsLineWithContent.vue"
import TabsMultiple from "@/examples/tabs/TabsMultiple.vue"
import TabsVariantsComparison from "@/examples/tabs/TabsVariantsComparison.vue"
import TabsVertical from "@/examples/tabs/TabsVertical.vue"
import TabsWithContent from "@/examples/tabs/TabsWithContent.vue"
import TabsWithDropdown from "@/examples/tabs/TabsWithDropdown.vue"
import TabsWithIcons from "@/examples/tabs/TabsWithIcons.vue"
import TabsWithInputAndButton from "@/examples/tabs/TabsWithInputAndButton.vue"

import { Example, ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <Example title="Basic">
      <TabsBasic />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Line">
      <TabsLine />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Variants Alignment">
      <TabsVariantsComparison />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Disabled">
      <TabsDisabled />
    </Example>
    <Example title="With Icons">
      <TabsWithIcons />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Icon Only">
      <TabsIconOnly />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Multiple">
      <TabsMultiple />
    </Example>
    <Example title="With Content">
      <TabsWithContent />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Line With Content">
      <TabsLineWithContent />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Line Disabled">
      <TabsLineDisabled />
    </Example>
    <Example title="With Dropdown">
      <TabsWithDropdown />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Vertical">
      <TabsVertical />
    </Example>
    <Example title="With Input and Button" container-class="col-span-full">
      <TabsWithInputAndButton />
    </Example>
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"

import IconPlaceholder from "@/components/IconPlaceholder.vue"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="home">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="home">
        <IconPlaceholder
          lucide="HomeIcon"
          tabler="IconHome"
          hugeicons="HomeIcon"
          phosphor="HouseIcon"
          remixicon="RiHomeLine"
        />
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="search">
        <IconPlaceholder
          lucide="SearchIcon"
          tabler="IconSearch"
          hugeicons="SearchIcon"
          phosphor="MagnifyingGlassIcon"
          remixicon="RiSearchLine"
        />
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="settings">
        <IconPlaceholder
          lucide="SettingsIcon"
          tabler="IconSettings"
          hugeicons="SettingsIcon"
          phosphor="GearIcon"
          remixicon="RiSettings3Line"
        />
      </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="overview">
    <TabsList variant="line">
      <TabsTrigger value="overview"> Overview </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="analytics"> Analytics </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="reports"> Reports </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="overview">
    <TabsList variant="line">
      <TabsTrigger value="overview"> Overview </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="analytics"> Analytics </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="reports" :disabled="true"> Reports </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="overview">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="overview"> Overview </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="analytics"> Analytics </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="reports"> Reports </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="settings"> Settings </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/ui/tabs"

import IconPlaceholder from "@/components/IconPlaceholder.vue"
</script>

<template>
  <Tabs default-value="preview">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="preview">
        <IconPlaceholder
          lucide="AppWindowIcon"
          tabler="IconAppWindow"
          hugeicons="CursorInWindowIcon"
          phosphor="AppWindowIcon"
          remixicon="RiWindow2Line"
        />
        Preview
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="code">
        <IconPlaceholder
          lucide="CodeIcon"
          tabler="IconCode"
          hugeicons="CodeIcon"
          phosphor="CodeIcon"
          remixicon="RiCodeLine"
        />
        Code
      </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</template>
